# Outside Game Copilot Instructions

- Keep the app on port 777 unless the user explicitly asks otherwise.
- Preserve the one-container Docker setup and the in-memory game flow unless the user requests persistence.
- Keep the UI bold, mobile-first, and suitable for outdoor use.
- Prefer small, testable changes that keep the two-team gameplay intact.
- When changing the game rules, update the admin dashboard and player UI together.
